prestazioni: MAHLE Motorsport forged pistons (9A2 EVO, 10.5:1 CR) with upgraded wrist pins and DLC-coated rings for the 4.0L 9A2 EVO (991.2 GT3) flat-six, retaining NA purity while increasing redline to 9,200 RPM via custom Schrick camshafts (284° intake/276° exhaust, 12.5mm lift) and titanium retainers from Carrillo.

Full titanium Akrapovič Evolution Line exhaust system with 4-2-1 headers (3.5" primaries, 4.5" collectors) and dual-mode bypass valves, paired with a custom Motec M150 ECU reflash for optimized torque curve (450 Nm @ 6,500 RPM) and 520 HP @ 8,800 RPM on 99+ octane.

Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression/rebound/bump), custom valving for the Speedster’s 991.2 GT3-derived rear-wheel-steering system, and TÜV-approved H&R lowering springs (-30mm front/-25mm rear) to eliminate body roll via stiffer anti-roll bars (Eibach 24mm front/22mm rear) and spherical bearing subframe mounts (034 Motorsport).
estetica: RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) ‘Kagura’ widebody kit with carbon fiber fenders (100mm front/120mm rear overhang), custom front splitter (991 GT3 RS-style) with integrated canards (Vorsteiner), and a ducktail spoiler (TechArt GTstreet) for -15% lift at 200 km/h.

Full carbon fiber interior retrofit: BBi Auto 911 Speedster-specific door cards (carbon/Kevlar hybrid), Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon shell, Alcantara inserts), and a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede) with integrated Motec C127 dash display (shift lights, oil temp, boost/vacuum).

Custom ‘Gulf’ livery by Foglizzo Leather (hand-stitched navy blue/racing orange), with matching Alcantara headliner, door pulls, and roll bar cover (911 Speedster-exclusive ‘double-bubble’ design), plus HRE FF01 wheels (19x9.5 ET45 front/20x12.5 ET50 rear) in matte gold with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35/19 front, 305/30/20 rear).
